name: Sonos, Inc.
description: Sonos, Inc. is a leading American audio technology company headquartered in Santa Barbara, California. Founded in 2002, the company specializes in the design and manufacturing of premium wireless speakers, home sound systems, and audio components. Sonos is widely recognized for revolutionizing the home audio experience by creating a seamless, multi-room wireless network that allows users to stream music and audio content throughout their homes. The company continues to innovate in the consumer electronics space, focusing on high-fidelity sound quality, ease of use, and integration with various digital streaming services and smart home ecosystems.
